# Claude Email Skill

Claude Email Skill is a skill package for Claude-oriented email prompts, reviews, and campaign drafting.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add claudeemailskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://claudeemailskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://claudeemailskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://claudeemailskill.com/skills/claudeemailskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://claudeemailskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Claude Email Strategy: https://claudeemailskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Claude Email Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://claudeemailskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Claude Email Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://claudeemailskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
